name: ai.quickdeploy/control-plane
title: QuickDeploy Control Plane
description: Manage QuickDeploy AI tenant deployments through the Control-Plane API: create deployments, read lifecycle and health state, run pause/resume/promote/rollback/quarantine/delete actions, read logs, and list target environments.

environmentVariables.name: QDAI_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: QuickDeploy service-account bearer token with deployments/environments/observability scopes (see https://api.quickdeploy.ai/auth.md).

environmentVariables.name: QDAI_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Control-Plane API origin override. Defaults to https://api.quickdeploy.ai.
